functionArgs: {"subagent_type":"researcher","prompt":"Check the current open issues for GitHub repository https://github.com/achieveai/LmdotnetTools. Use GitHub API if available. Return a concise list with issue number, title, labels, assignees, comments, updated time, and URL, plus count of open PRs if seen. If auth/tooling fails, say so explicitly.","description":"Recheck GitHub issues","name":"gh-issues-recheck","model":"","run_in_background":false,"add_tools":"","remove_tools":""}
